title: Create a Flask App Instance Counter

content.problemStatement:
In this worked out example, we'll create a simple Flask application that demonstrates the role of the Flask app instance by counting the number of times it has been accessed. \
This will help you understand how the app instance manages state and handles requests.

Review the code in the IDE which does the following: 
1. Import the necessary modules and create a Flask app instance.
2. Create a global variable to store the access count.
3. Define a route that increments the count and returns it.
4. Run the application.


**Note:** try to refresh the page and see the counter increasing. \
**Question:** Can you think as to why the counter on the web starts with 2 and not 1?

Click on 'Run' to view the output on the webpage. \
Click on 'Submit' to check if your code is correct.
